speaker: cat
text: suno na suno na… API kya hota hai? aur use kaise karte hai?

speaker: toji
text: API ek bridge hota hai… jisse do softwares ek dusre se baat karte hain.

speaker: cat
text: matlab app khud sab nahi karta?

speaker: toji
text: nahi. Jaise tum weather app kholte ho, woh khud weather nahi janta, woh weather server se API ke through puchta hai.

speaker: cat
text: ohhh… matlab question idhar se… answer udhar se?

speaker: toji
text: bilkul. Request jaati hai, response aata hai.

speaker: cat
text: toh main bhi API use kar rahi hoti hoon daily?

speaker: toji
text: roz. login, maps, payments… sab API se chalta hai.

speaker: cat
text: achaa… toh WebRTC bhi API hai?

speaker: toji
text: WebRTC APIs ka set hai, par woh special hai.

speaker: toji
text: normal API server ke through baat karata hai… WebRTC me browser seedha dusre browser se baat karta hai.

speaker: toji
text: haan. Server sirf introduce karta hai… baaki tum dono khud baat karte ho.

speaker: cat
text: ohhh so API matlab baat karne ka tareeka… aur WebRTC matlab seedhi baat?
